user.title: 1. Server Connection
user.description: Enter your Proxmox address. Port is handled automatically (8006 for PVE / 8007 for PBS).

auth_method.title: 2. Authentication Method
auth_method.description: Choose between Username/Password or a secure API Token.

credentials.title: 3. Access Credentials
credentials.description: Enter the credentials to connect to your server.

select_resources.title: 4. Resource Selection
select_resources.description: Only selected items will create entities in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Check the host address.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Verify credentials or Token permissions.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check Home Assistant logs.

abort.pbs_no_options: This PBS server has no configurable options.

init.title: Proxmox Sensors Options
init.description: Modify which resources you want to monitor for this node.
